title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani calls on U.S. government to arrest foreign leader
summary: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani stated the city cannot execute an arrest warrant from the International Criminal Court for Benjamin Netanyahu but called on the federal government to do so. This represents a significant intergovernmental policy statement on international law enforcement.

political_signal.description: Mayor publicly calls on federal government to arrest foreign leader based on ICC warrant, signaling opposition to Netanyahu's conduct and advocating for international law enforcement.
